methodology.legacy_blind_spot: benchmark_cold_start.py and test_benchmark_cold_start.py start their timers after importing Kida, so their cold-start figures exclude import cost.
methodology.memory: Timing samples run without tracemalloc. Separate memory samples report peak tracemalloc allocation during the isolated phase; process_peak_rss_after_bytes is cumulative process peak RSS at phase end.
methodology.module_closure: Loaded kida module names and unique physical Python source LOC are collected after the timed phase and do not contribute to elapsed_ms.
methodology.output_sanity: An untimed source/warm/bytecode-cache preflight passes before any timing; each timed render rechecks exact output.

phase_definitions.environment_construction: Environment() after imports; excludes import and process startup.
phase_definitions.first_bytecode_cache_render: First get_template/render in a clean process against an untimed prepopulated cache.
phase_definitions.first_source_render: Environment.from_string plus first render; excludes imports/environment construction.
phase_definitions.import_environment: Clean-process `from kida import Environment`; excludes process startup.
phase_definitions.import_kida: Clean-process import kida; excludes process startup.
phase_definitions.warm_render: Second render of one already compiled in-process template.

methodology.process_startup: Parent-observed wall time for an isolated -I -S interpreter executing only a minimal resource.getrusage RSS probe.
